case_title: NANCY WU VS. JEREMY CHASEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-30-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF NANCY WU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT(S) JEREMY AND KRISTIN CHASEN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, NANCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHASEN, JEREMY CHASEN, KRISTIN $1,170.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,345.00, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2019 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. JEREMY CHASEN & KRISTIN CHASEN DOES NOT OWE NANCY WU ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF SEP-10-2019. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-14-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nancy Wu Plaintiff/Respondent is present
Kristin Chasen and Jeremy Chasen, Defendant/Appellants are present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Kristin Chasen testifies on behalf of herself and the defendant/appellant Jeremy Chasen. The Court reviews the previously submitted evidence. No new evidence is submitted.

Nancy Wu testifies on behalf of herself. The Court reviews the previously submitted evidence. No new evidence is submitted.

The Court hears further from both sides and Plaintiff/Respondent Nancy Wu presents witness Augustus Lee to present testimony.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

JPT Jason Jungries, Clerk: A. Pascual, not reported. (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-10-2019 Judgment Entered
